ronin_idle.notes: 4 directions, 96px canvas, stylized proportions, detailed shading

warrior_battle.notes: Form 2 Warrior — batch after ronin_idle passes quality check

evolution_strip.notes: All 4 forms side-by-side — generate after all forms pass quality check

avatar_sm.notes: 32x48 corner nav avatar — derive from ronin_idle south direction

map_base.notes: Feudal Japan overworld, 1600x1000px — generate after character passes check

fog_overlay.notes: Semi-transparent mist — implement as CSS gradient/blur overlay for V1

streak_bar.notes: 10-segment streak bar — built in CSS, no image needed
